title: Gravity Manipulation
wikitext:
[[File:Gravity_Manipulation.jpg|thumb|400px|]]

==Summary==
The ability to '''manipulate gravity''', one of the four fundamental forces that shape our universe.

Through the manipulation of gravity, users can emulate [[telekinesis]] and [[flight]], can attract and repulse objects, can create local gravity fields to immobilize and even crush enemies. Sufficiently powerful users can potentially distort time and space and [[Black Hole Creation|create black holes]].

Please note that surviving or moving in increased gravity will not grant resistance to gravity manipulation, unless there is extra context demonstrating that it is not just a [[Lifting Strength]] feat.

==Examples==
As with all example lists, this is not comprehensive.

* [[Teridax]] and [[Mata Nui]] ([[Bionicle]])
* [[Enrico Pucci]] with C-Moon ([[JoJo's Bizarre Adventure]])
* [[Silver Surfer (Marvel Comics)|Silver Surfer]] ([[Marvel Comics]])
* Rinnegan Users ([[Naruto (Verse)|Naruto]])
* [[Marshall D. Teach (Blackbeard)|Blackbeard]] and [[Issho (Admiral Fujitora)|Fujitora]] ([[One Piece]])
* [[Hao Asakura]] ([[Shaman King]])
* [[Suika Ibuki]] ([[Touhou Project]])
* [[Papyrus]] and [[Sans]] ([[Undertale]])
* [[Han Dae-Wi]], [[Park Mu-Jin]], and [[The King of Nox]] ([[The God of High School]])
